Why teams choose TaskFlow

About TaskFlow

TaskFlow was designed for people who want momentum, not just checklists. We blend planning, focus, and reflection into one elegant workspace so your goals stay visible and your days stay intentional.

Enterprise-grade security

Powerful Features

Everything you need to organize your life and boost productivity

Lightning Fast

Real-time synchronization across all your devices. Never lose a task again.

Learn more

Smart Scheduling

Intelligent calendar integration with automatic deadline suggestions.

Learn more

Streak Tracking

Build momentum with daily streaks and motivational achievements.

Learn more

Focus Mode

Eliminate distractions with immersive focus sessions and timers.

Learn more

Analytics

Visual insights into your productivity patterns and progress.

Learn more

Kanban Boards

Drag-and-drop task management with beautiful board views.

Learn more

Pricing That Scales With You

Start free, then upgrade when your workflow needs more power.

Starter

$0/mo

Perfect for personal productivity

  • Unlimited tasks
  • List + Calendar views
  • Daily streak tracking

Pro

$9/mo

For focused professionals

  • Everything in Starter
  • Kanban + advanced analytics
  • Priority support

Team

$19/mo

Built for collaborative teams

  • Everything in Pro
  • Shared workspaces
  • Team productivity dashboard
